title: Research Scholars Workshop: Research Next Steps - Building into Graduate School or Entrepreneurship
author: Deters, Robert
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this workshop, we will explore stepping stones from your undergraduate research experience, whether you want to go into grad school, enter a research-focused career, or engage in research-based entrepreneurial activities.
steps_raw: In this workshop, we will explore stepping stones from your undergraduate research experience, whether you want to go into grad school, enter a research-focused career, or engage in research-based entrepreneurial activities.
